records.question: Which Robinson R-22 light utility helicopters with a max disk loading of 2.6 lb/ft² (14 kg/m²) operate at airports that have exactly 30431051.0 international passengers, exactly 34205887.0 total passengers, at least 263653.0 aircraft movements, at least 107702.0 freight metric tonnes, and at least 3730963.0 domestic passengers?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT aircraft.aircraft_id FROM aircraft
JOIN airport_aircraft ON aircraft.aircraft_id = airport_aircraft.aircraft_id
JOIN airport ON airport_aircraft.airport_id = airport.airport_id
WHERE aircraft.aircraft = 'Robinson R-22' AND airport.international_passengers = 30431051.0 AND airport.aircraft_movements >= 263653.0 AND airport.freight_metric_tonnes >= 107702.0 AND airport.total_passengers = 34205887.0 AND airport.domestic_passengers >= 3730963.0 AND aircraft.description = 'Light utility helicopter' AND aircraft.max_disk_loading = '2.6 lb/ft² (14 kg/m²)'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT a.Aircraft_ID
FROM aircraft a
JOIN airport_aircraft aa ON a.Aircraft_ID = aa.Aircraft_ID
JOIN airport ap ON aa.Airport_ID = ap.Airport_ID
WHERE a.Aircraft = 'Robinson R-22'
  AND a.Max_disk_Loading = '2.6 lb/ft² (14 kg/m²)'
  AND ap.International_Passengers = 30431051.0
  AND ap.Total_Passengers = 34205887.0
  AND ap.Aircraft_Movements >= 263653.0
  AND ap.Freight_Metric_Tonnes >= 107702.0
  AND ap.Domestic_Passengers >= 3730963.0
